description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named MSBuild that runs on push and pull request events to the main branch, excluding certain paths. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build a project with different combinations of Visual Studio versions (2019, 2022), build types (Debug, Release), and platforms (x86, x64, ARM64) on Windows. It checks out the code, adds MSBuild to the PATH, and then runs multiple msbuild commands with different configurations and platforms.
